title: mesosphaerum nitidulum
intro: Mesosphaerum nitidulum, also known as Lemon Balm Mint or Pennyroyal, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include acting as an antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory agent, as well as possessing carminative and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum nitidulum include relief from digestive issues, stress, and anxiety, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Mesosphaerum nitidulum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, added to bath waters, or applied topically to the skin.
